source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

segments.text: Landlord: Hello?
segments.translation: 喂？

segments.text: Student: Oh, hello.
segments.translation: 哦，你好。

segments.text: Student: I wanted to enquire about the house you're going to let out.
segments.translation: 我想咨询一下你要出租的那套房子。

segments.text: Student: Is it still available?
segments.translation: 现在还能租吗？

segments.text: Landlord: Yes.
segments.translation: 能租。

segments.text: Landlord: May I ask where you heard about it?
segments.translation: 我能问一下你是从哪儿知道这套房子的吗？

segments.text: Landlord: Was it in an advert?
segments.translation: 是在广告上看到的吗？

segments.text: Student: Right, it was.
segments.translation: 对，就是在广告上看到的。

segments.text: Landlord: OK, what do you want to know?
segments.translation: 好的，你想了解些什么？

segments.text: Student: Well, I'm going to share the house with two friends.
segments.translation: 是这样的，我打算和两个朋友合租这套房子。

segments.text: Student: We've been staying on campus, but we're going to graduate, so we need to find a house as soon as possible.
segments.translation: 我们一直住在学校里，但快毕业了，所以得尽快找个房子。

segments.text: Student: Anyway, could you tell me the exact date when we can move in?
segments.translation: 对了，你能告诉我我们具体从哪天可以搬进去吗？

segments.text: Landlord: Well, the contract with my current tenant is due next week, on May 3rd.
segments.translation: 嗯，我和现在租客的合同下周就到期了，是5月3号。

segments.text: Landlord: And I need a day to clean and check the things in the house, so I think the house will be ready on 5th May.
segments.translation: 我还得花一天时间打扫、检查一下房子里的东西，所以我想房子5月5号就能准备好了。

segments.text: Landlord: Is that OK?
segments.translation: 这样可以吗？

segments.text: Student: Yes, that will be fine.
segments.translation: 可以，那没问题。

segments.text: Student: And what we're most concerned about is the rent.
segments.translation: 还有我们最在意的就是房租。

segments.text: Student: We'd like something around 500 dollars a month for each of us, but we could go up to 600 dollars if we have to.
segments.translation: 我们希望每人每月500美元左右，实在不行的话最多可以到600美元。

segments.text: Student: But we can't go beyond that.
segments.translation: 但再高就不行了。

segments.text: Landlord: You are lucky – the rent will be 1,700 dollars in total, which is within your budget.
segments.translation: 你们很走运——房租总共是1700美元，在你们的预算范围内。

segments.text: Landlord: You'll need to pay monthly to me, by cash or credit card, I don't mind.
segments.translation: 你们要按月付给我，付现金或者刷信用卡都行，我无所谓。

segments.text: Landlord: And you'll have to pay me 1,500 dollars as a deposit before you move in.
segments.translation: 另外你们搬进来之前得先付给我1500美元作为押金。

segments.text: Landlord: The deposit is as insurance, in case you break something.
segments.translation: 押金相当于一种保障，万一你们弄坏了什么东西可以用。

segments.text: Student: OK, that's reasonable.
segments.translation: 好的，这挺合理的。

segments.text: Landlord: Oh, I nearly forgot.
segments.translation: 哦，我差点忘了。

segments.text: Landlord: One important thing is that you'll be required to provide a credit check to guarantee your ability to pay the rent every month.
segments.translation: 有件重要的事，就是你们需要提供一份信用检查，用来证明你们每个月都有能力付房租。

segments.text: Landlord: This will charge you 15 dollars.
segments.translation: 这个要收你们15美元。

segments.text: Student: No problem.
segments.translation: 没问题。

segments.text: Student: How about the facilities?
segments.translation: 那房子的设施怎么样？

segments.text: Landlord: First there are three bedrooms combined with two bathrooms.
segments.translation: 首先有三间卧室配两个卫生间。

segments.text: Landlord: Then there is a shared kitchen which was refurbished several months ago.
segments.translation: 然后有一个公用厨房，几个月前刚翻新过。

segments.text: Landlord: By the way, do you cook yourselves?
segments.translation: 顺便问一下，你们自己做饭吗？

segments.text: Student: Yeah, we like cooking.
segments.translation: 做的，我们喜欢做饭。

segments.text: Student: Do we have to buy our own cookers?
segments.translation: 那我们得自己买灶具吗？

segments.text: Landlord: Basic facilities for cooking are available, but if you want a dishwasher, I'm sorry it needs to be added later.
segments.translation: 做饭的基本设施都有，不过如果你们想要洗碗机的话，抱歉，那得以后再添了。

segments.text: Student: I think the basic facilities are enough for us.
segments.translation: 我觉得基本设施对我们来说就够了。

segments.text: Student: Is there any place we can park?
segments.translation: 有地方可以停车吗？

segments.text: Student: As one of my friends has a private car.
segments.translation: 因为我有个朋友有私家车。

segments.text: Landlord: Yes, there is a garage which not only provides space for your car but also has a special section where you can do some of your work.
segments.translation: 有的，有一个车库，不但能停车，还有一块专门的区域可以让你们干点活儿。

segments.text: Landlord: It's very quiet for you to concentrate.
segments.translation: 那里很安静，方便你们专心做事。

segments.text: Student: It sounds so special!
segments.translation: 听起来太特别了！

segments.text: Landlord: There are some other utilities I have to tell you.
segments.translation: 还有一些其他的配套我得跟你们说一下。

segments.text: Landlord: There is a garden in front of the house, in which you will find some interesting plants and beautiful flowers.
segments.translation: 房子前面有个花园，里面有一些有意思的植物和漂亮的花。

segments.text: Student: Do we have to take care of these plants and flowers?
segments.translation: 这些植物和花需要我们来打理吗？

segments.text: Landlord: Well, you don't have to worry about that.
segments.translation: 这个你们不用操心。

segments.text: Landlord: There will be a professional gardener to do the landscaping in the garden regularly.
segments.translation: 会有专业的园丁定期来做园林养护。

segments.text: Landlord: But you do need to help water the grass once a week.
segments.translation: 但你们确实需要每周帮忙给草坪浇一次水。

segments.text: Landlord: Is it a problem for you?
segments.translation: 这对你们来说有问题吗？

segments.text: Student: Of course not.
segments.translation: 当然没问题。

segments.text: Student: We'd like to do that.
segments.translation: 我们很乐意做这个。

segments.text: Landlord: Another thing is, in this district every household is arranged with a cleaner responsible for cleaning up the rubbish and recycling, but this service will cost you 15 dollars every month.
segments.translation: 还有一件事，这个片区每户都会安排一名清洁工负责清理垃圾和回收，不过这项服务每月要收你们15美元。

segments.text: Student: What other bills do we have to pay?
segments.translation: 我们还要付哪些账单呢？

segments.text: Landlord: Bills for electricity, water and gas will also be covered by yourselves.
segments.translation: 电费、水费和燃气费也要你们自己承担。

segments.text: Student: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Student: One more question, is air-conditioning available in the house?
segments.translation: 还有一个问题，房子里有空调吗？

segments.text: Landlord: If you mean central air-conditioning, I'm afraid there isn't at the moment, but each room has a conditioning unit which is installed on the window.
segments.translation: 如果你说的是中央空调，恐怕现在是没有的，不过每个房间的窗户上都装了一台空调。

segments.text: Student: That will be fine.
segments.translation: 那就行了。

segments.text: Student: Anyway, I think it's a good place to live in.
segments.translation: 总之，我觉得这是个不错的居住地方。

segments.text: Student: Can we go and see the house, please?
segments.translation: 我们能去看看房子吗？

segments.text: Landlord: Yes, of course.
segments.translation: 当然可以。

segments.text: Student: May I have your name and phone number?
segments.translation: 能给我你的名字和电话号码吗？

segments.text: Landlord: Yes, I'm Sam Dressler.
segments.translation: 可以，我叫Sam Dressler。

segments.text: Landlord: That's S-A-M, D-R-E-double S-L-E-R.
segments.translation: 拼作S-A-M，D-R-E，两个S，L-E-R。

segments.text: Student: OK, Sam Dressler, I've got that down.
segments.translation: 好的，Sam Dressler，我记下来了。

segments.text: Landlord: And my phone number is 6753 4571.
segments.translation: 我的电话号码是6753 4571。

segments.text: Student: Thank you very much.
segments.translation: 非常感谢。

segments.text: Student: I'll contact you after discussing it with my two friends.
segments.translation: 我和两个朋友商量一下再联系你。

segments.text: Landlord: No problem.
segments.translation: 没问题。

segments.text: Landlord: Bye!
segments.translation: 再见！

segments.text: Student: Bye!
segments.translation: 再见！
